title: State pays thousands to TBS patients forced to wait in prison cells as clinics overcrowd
title_zh: 由于诊所人满为患，州政府向被迫在监狱牢房中等待的结核病患者支付数千美元。
description: The Dutch state is paying rising compensation to psychiatric patients under TBS (mandatory treatment in a secure mental health facility) who are forced to wait in ordinary prison cells due to overc
description_zh: 荷兰政府正向因监狱人满为患而被迫在普通牢房等待治疗的、根据强制精神健康机构（TBS）规定接受治疗的精神病患者支付不断上涨的补偿金。

title: Nine sentenced for gang shootings and explosions in Purmerend and Middenbeemster
title_zh: 九人因在普尔默伦德和米登比姆斯特发生的帮派枪击和爆炸事件被判刑
description: Nine men involved in rival youth gangs in Purmerend and Middenbeemster have been
description_zh: 九名分别涉嫌参与普尔默伦德和米登比姆斯特敌对青年团伙的男子已被……

title: Netherlands faces second aging wave as birth rates fall; Population could drop below 10M
title_zh: 荷兰面临第二波人口老龄化浪潮，出生率下降；人口可能跌破1000万。
description: The Netherlands is at risk of a second wave of population aging that could have severe economic and social consequences.
description_zh: 荷兰面临第二波人口老龄化的风险，这可能会带来严重的经济和社会后果。

title: German authorities stop dumping deported people in Dutch border towns
title_zh: 德国当局停止将被驱逐者安置在荷兰边境城镇
description: The German border police will stopdumping migrantsarbitrarily acros
description_zh: 德国边防警察将停止随意将移民倾倒在边境线上。

title: Curaçao Prime Minister also cancels Netherlands visit amid U.S.-Venezuela tensions
title_zh: 受美委关系紧张影响，库拉索首相取消了对荷兰的访问。
description: Curaçao’s Prime Minister Gilmar Pisas canceled a planned visit to the Netherlands, citing the need to remain on the island amid escalating tensions between the United States and Venezuela.
description_zh: 库拉索总理吉尔马·皮萨斯取消了原定的荷兰之行，理由是美国和委内瑞拉之间的紧张局势不断升级，他需要留在岛上。

title: EU fines X €120M for misleading blue checkmarks, hidden ads; Musk says ‘bullshit’
title_zh: 欧盟因误导性蓝V认证和隐藏广告对X处以1.2亿欧元罚款；马斯克称“胡扯”
description: The European CommissionfinedX 120 million euros on Friday for violating the Digital Services Act, citing misleading
description_zh: 欧盟委员会周五对X公司处以1.2亿欧元的罚款，原因是该公司违反了《数字服务法》，理由是其存在误导性信息。

title: Singer Borsato declines all performances after acquittal in child sex abuse case
title_zh: 歌手博尔萨托在儿童性虐待案中被判无罪后，拒绝了所有演出。
description: Marco Borsato will not perform at any point in the coming year, his management said Saturday, days after a court in Utrecht
description_zh: 马尔科·博尔萨托的经纪公司周六表示，博尔萨托在未来一年内将不会进行任何演出。此前几天，乌得勒支一家法院做出了上述裁决。

title: Amsterdam delays vote on erotic center after D66 pulls support
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹推迟对情色中心的投票，此前D66党撤回了支持
description: Amsterdam has postponed any decision on a proposed erotic center in Zuid after D66 withdrew its support from the project, leaving the plan politically uncertain ahead of the municipal elections in
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹推迟了对在南区（Zuid）拟建的情色中心项目的任何决定，此前D66党撤回了对该项目的支持，这使得该计划在市政选举前夕的政治前景变得不明朗。

title: Dutch Christmas tree shoppers face fines if tree isn’t secured properly
title_zh: 荷兰规定，如果圣诞树没有妥善固定，购买者将面临罚款。
description: Saturday is expected to be thebusiest Christmas tree shopping dayin the Netherlands, rai
description_zh: 据荷兰广播公司报道，预计周六将是荷兰圣诞树购物最繁忙的一天。

title: Dutch broadcaster details complicated Eurovision vote that led to boycot
title_zh: 荷兰广播公司详细报道了导致抵制的复杂欧洲歌唱大赛投票过程
description: Dutch public broadcaster AVROTROS detailed a tense and complex European Broadcasting Union (EBU) meeting in Geneva that directly led to its decision to withdraw from next year’s Eurovision Song Con
description_zh: 荷兰公共广播公司AVROTROS详细报道了在日内瓦举行的欧洲广播联盟（EBU）一次紧张而复杂的会议，这次会议直接导致EBU决定退出明年的欧洲歌唱大赛。

title: New EU legislation threatens the availability of life-saving medicines: Pharmacists
title_zh: 药剂师称，欧盟新法规威胁救命药物的供应。
description: Dutch pharmacists warn that new European Union drug legislation could leave patients without essential medicines.
description_zh: 荷兰药剂师警告说，欧盟新的药品法规可能会导致患者无法获得必需药物。

title: Public Prosecution Service identifies three dead in The Hague crash after police pursuit
title_zh: 荷兰公共检察署确认海牙车祸中三名死者身份，该车祸系警方追捕后引发。
description: The Public Prosecution Service has officially identified the three people whodied early Thu
description_zh: 检察机关已正式确认周四凌晨死亡的三人身份。

title: EU Commission slaps fine on X over “deceptive” practices
title_zh: 欧盟委员会因“欺骗性”行为对X公司处以罚款
description: The European Commission on Friday slapped a €120 million fine on Elon Musk’s social media platform X for breaching transparency...
description_zh: 欧盟委员会周五对埃隆·马斯克的社交媒体平台X处以1.2亿欧元的罚款，原因是其违反了透明度规定……

title: Wet, windy weather expected during busiest Christmas tree shopping day
title_zh: 预计在圣诞树购物最繁忙的一天将出现潮湿多风的天气。
description: A soft but unsettled weather system and the year’s busiest Christmas tree shopping day are set to collide this weekend across the Netherlands, with forecasters warning of rain, wind, and unusually
description_zh: 本周末，一股强度较弱但不稳定的天气系统将与一年中最繁忙的圣诞树购物日叠加，席卷荷兰各地。气象预报员警告称，届时将出现降雨、大风和异常高温天气。

title: D66 leader Jetten rules out coalition with JA21, VVD; calls center-right path unviable
title_zh: D66党领袖杰滕排除与JA21和VVD组建联合政府的可能性；称中右翼道路不可行。
description: D66 leader Rob Jetten said Friday that a coalition including VVD and JA21 is not feasible, calling a right-center government "not a workable path."
description_zh: D66领导人罗布·杰滕周五表示，包括VVD和JA21在内的联合政府是不可行的，称右翼中间派政府“不是一条可行的道路”。

title: Netherlands residents now working 2.5 years longer versus a decade ago
title_zh: 荷兰居民现在的工作年限比十年前延长了2.5年。
description: Researchers discovered people in the Netherlands are working roughly 30 months more before deciding to retire, compared to a similar study released a decade ago.
description_zh: 研究人员发现，与十年前发布的一项类似研究相比，荷兰人平均多工作了大约 30 个月才决定退休。

title: One dead, one critical after car hits tree and bursts into flames near Ermelo
title_zh: 埃尔梅洛附近一辆汽车撞树后起火，造成一人死亡，一人重伤。
description: A car slammed into a tree at high speed and immediately burst into flames between Ermelo and Elspeet Friday night, killing one person and leaving another critically injured.
description_zh: 周五晚上，在埃尔梅洛和埃尔斯皮特之间，一辆汽车高速撞上一棵树，随即起火，造成一人死亡，一人重伤。

title: Two Erasmus hospital employees fired for unauthorized access to patient records
title_zh: 两名伊拉斯谟医院员工因擅自查阅病人记录而被解雇
description: Two employees of Erasmus MC have been dismissed with immediate effect for unlawfully accessing patient records, the hospital reported.
description_zh: 据医院方面消息，伊拉斯谟医学中心的两名员工因非法获取病人记录而被立即解雇。

title: One in five hospitality businesses struggling with mounting debts
title_zh: 五分之一的餐饮企业正苦苦挣扎于不断增加的债务之中
description: An increasing number of hospitality businesses are dealing with problematic debts.
description_zh: 越来越多的餐饮企业正面临债务问题。

title: Tiger mosquito expected to become permanent in the Netherlands within 5 years
title_zh: 预计五年内，虎蚊将在荷兰定居。
description: The tiger mosquito is expected to become a permanent presence in the Netherlands within two to five years, making full eradication impossible.
description_zh: 预计在两到五年内，虎蚊将在荷兰永久存在，彻底根除虎蚊将变得不可能。

title: Big power consumers in Noord-Brabant could get grid connection for 1st time since 2022
title_zh: 北布拉班特省的大型电力用户有望自2022年以来首次并入电网。
description: TenneT, the national electricity transmission operator, announced that it will free up 805 megawatts (MW) of capacity on the high-voltage grid in Noord-Brabant over the next two years,
description_zh: 国家电力传输运营商TenneT宣布，未来两年内，将在北布拉班特省的高压电网中释放805兆瓦（MW）的容量。

title: Netherlands to take on Japan, Tunisia at the 2026 World Cup; Curacao vs Germany
title_zh: 荷兰将在2026年世界杯上对阵日本和突尼斯；库拉索对阵德国
description: The Dutch men's national football team will lead Group F during the World Cup next year, taking on rivals Japan, Tunisia, and a playoff winner to be determined later.
description_zh: 荷兰男足国家队将在明年的世界杯上领衔F组，迎战日本、突尼斯以及之后将决出的附加赛胜者。

title: Most Dutch homes are more energy-efficient than official labels indicate
title_zh: 大多数荷兰房屋的能源效率都高于官方标签所示。
description: Many Dutch homes are more energy-efficient than official records suggest, according to a new report from Brainbay, the research division of real estate association
description_zh: 根据房地产协会研究部门Brainbay发布的一份新报告，许多荷兰住宅的能源效率比官方记录显示的要高。

title: Minister justifies Netherlands’ case-by-case approach to Afghan women’s asylum requests
title_zh: 部长为荷兰对阿富汗妇女庇护申请采取个案处理方式辩护
description: Caretaker Asylum Minister David van Weel said that Afghan women are not automatically entitled to asylum, even though the authorities in Afghanistan systematically oppress and persecute women who d
description_zh: 代理庇护部长戴维·范·维尔表示，阿富汗妇女并非自动享有庇护权，尽管阿富汗当局系统性地压迫和迫害妇女。

title: French police arrest Amsterdam man tied to Rotterdam murder
title_zh: 法国警方逮捕了一名与鹿特丹谋杀案有关的阿姆斯特丹男子。
description: A 25-year-old man from Amsterdam was arrested by the French police on Thursday following a request from Dutch authorities.
description_zh: 周四，应荷兰当局的要求，法国警方逮捕了一名来自阿姆斯特丹的25岁男子。

title: Vught prison hostage situation unfolding: Suspect convicted in Ede cafe hostage incident
title_zh: 弗特监狱人质事件进展：埃德咖啡馆人质事件嫌疑人被定罪
description: A hostage situation is unfolding in the psychiatric wing of the Vught prison, according to the Custodial Institutions Agency (DJI).
description_zh: 据监狱机构管理局 (DJI) 称，弗赫特监狱精神病房正在发生人质劫持事件。

title: Dutch Navy monitoring Caribbean waters as tensions rise between U.S., Venezuela
title_zh: 随着美国和委内瑞拉之间的紧张局势加剧，荷兰海军正在密切关注加勒比海水域。
description: The Dutch soldiers stationed on the islands of Aruba, Bonaire, and Curaçao are scaling back their counterdrug operations in favor of monitoring the Caribbean waters.
description_zh: 驻扎在阿鲁巴岛、博内尔岛和库拉索岛的荷兰士兵正在缩减缉毒行动，转而监控加勒比海域。

title: Johan Cruijff ArenA to press charges after fireworks chaos, 10–15 suspects identified
title_zh: 约翰·克鲁伊夫竞技场将就烟花骚乱事件提起诉讼，已确认10至15名嫌疑人。
description: The Johan Cruijff ArenA plans to report incidents, including trespassing, public violence, and arson, by early next week after large-scale fireworks were set off during the Ajax–FC Groningen match
description_zh: 在阿贾克斯对阵格罗宁根的比赛期间发生大规模烟花燃放事件后，约翰·克鲁伊夫竞技场计划在下周初报告包括擅闯私人领地、公共暴力和纵火在内的事件。

title: Economic Affairs Min. stands by controversial Nexperia intervention despite fallout
title_zh: 经济事务部长力挺备受争议的Nexperia干预措施，尽管引发了轩然大波。
description: Caretaker Minister of Economic Affairs Vincent Karremans thought about alerting foreign governments before moving to curb the activities of chip producer Nexperia.
description_zh: 经济事务代理部长文森特·卡雷曼斯在采取行动遏制芯片生产商Nexperia的活动之前，曾考虑过向外国政府发出警报。

title: "American conditions": CEO gets $205 mil. bonus after Dutch biotech company's takeover
title_zh: “美国式条件”：荷兰生物技术公司被收购后，CEO获得2.05亿美元奖金
description: The Dutch biotech company Merus is being acquired by fellow industry player Genmab.
description_zh: 荷兰生物技术公司Merus将被业内另一家公司Genmab收购。

title: Podcast: The Schrödinger’s Problem Wolf Edition
title_zh: 播客：薛定谔问题狼版
description: Want to support the DutchNews podcast and keep up our stocks of stroopwafels and orange tompouces? Click here to become...
description_zh: 想支持 DutchNews 播客，并让我们的焦糖华夫饼和橙味甜甜圈库存充足吗？点击此处成为……

title: Rotterdam man arrested over child sexual abuse and livestreams in the Philippines
title_zh: 鹿特丹男子因在菲律宾性侵儿童并进行直播而被捕
description: Rotterdam police arrested a 78-year-old man this week on suspicion of sexually abusing children in the Philippines and broadcasting the abuse online.
description_zh: 本周，鹿特丹警方逮捕了一名 78 岁男子，他涉嫌在菲律宾性侵儿童并将虐待行为在网上传播。

title: Five party leaders to continue coalition talks over the weekend
title_zh: 五位政党领导人将在周末继续进行组阁谈判。
description: The leaders of the five parties currently involved in talks to form a new coalition government will continue their discussions...
description_zh: 目前参与组建新联合政府谈判的五个政党的领导人将继续进行磋商……

title: What prompted most Google searches in NL? 6-7…
title_zh: 在荷兰，大多数谷歌搜索的动机是什么？6-7…
description: The most frequently searched term in 2025 in the Netherlands according to Google’s Year in Search was voting aid “stemwijzer”,...
description_zh: 根据谷歌发布的《年度搜索报告》，2025年荷兰搜索量最高的词条是“投票援助”（stemwijzer）……

title: NPO to broadcast Eurovision 2026 despite Netherlands’ withdrawal
title_zh: 尽管荷兰退出，NPO仍将播出2026年欧洲歌唱大赛。
description: Public broadcaster NPO will air the Eurovision Song Contest in May on NPO 1, even though the Netherlands will not take part in the 2026 edition in Vienna, the broadcaster announced on Friday.
description_zh: 荷兰公共广播公司NPO周五宣布，尽管荷兰不会参加2026年在维也纳举行的欧洲歌唱大赛，但NPO仍将于5月在NPO 1频道播出该赛事。

title: NPO1 will air Eurovision Song Festival after Dutch withdrawal
title_zh: 荷兰退出后，NPO1将继续播出欧洲歌唱大赛。
description: Public broadcasting channel NPO1 will air next May’s Eurovision Song Contest following the decision by AvroTros to pull out of...
description_zh: 由于AvroTros公司决定退出，公共广播频道NPO1将播出明年5月的欧洲歌唱大赛……

title: Wilders' iron grip on PVV slipping as local factions break with party
title_zh: 随着地方派系与党决裂，维尔德斯对PVV的铁腕控制正在减弱。
description: The foundations under the PVV seem to be cracking. In the past week, members of three local factions have decided to jump ship.
description_zh: PVV的根基似乎正在动摇。过去一周，三个地方派系的成员决定退出该党。

title: Albert Heijn must pay worker €17,000 for wrongful dismissal over taking extra freebies
title_zh: Albert Heijn超市因员工拿取额外免费赠品而将其非法解雇，必须向该员工支付17000欧元赔偿金。
description: An Albert Heijn franchise in Limburg has to pay an employee €17,000 in severance pay for wrongful dismissal, according to a
description_zh: 据报道，林堡省一家 Albert Heijn 加盟店因非法解雇一名员工，需向其支付 17,000 欧元遣散费。

title: Utrecht city council backs plan to ban fatbikes in the city
title_zh: 乌特勒支市议会支持禁止在该市销售胖胎自行车的计划
description: A majority in the Utrecht city council has backed a plan to ban fatbikes in the city as soon as possible.
description_zh: 乌得勒支市议会的大多数议员支持一项计划，尽快禁止在该市使用胖胎自行车。

title: Chief Piet threatened for “giving away the Sinterklaas secret”
title_zh: 皮特酋长威胁说“泄露了圣尼古拉斯的秘密”。
description: Niels van der Laan, the actor who plays the role of “chief Piet” in the televised news story leading up...
description_zh: 在电视新闻报道中扮演“皮特警长”的演员是尼尔斯·范德兰……

title: Weekend will bring milder but still mostly cloudy weather
title_zh: 周末天气将较为温和，但仍以多云为主。
description: After several days of cloudy and fairly cold autumn weather, temperatures will edge up slightly this weekend, with Saturday expected...
description_zh: 经过几天阴冷潮湿的秋季天气后，本周末气温将略有回升，预计周六……

title: Appeals court reduces sentences for Maccabi football violence
title_zh: 上诉法院减轻了马卡比足球队暴力事件的刑罚
description: Two men convicted for their roles in the violence surrounding the Ajax–Maccabi Tel Aviv football match last November have had...
description_zh: 两名因参与去年11月阿贾克斯对阵特拉维夫马卡比足球比赛期间发生的暴力事件而被定罪的男子……

title: Tiger mosquito could soon be here to stay, warns minister
title_zh: 部长警告：虎蚊可能很快就会长期存在。
description: The tiger mosquito will probably become a permanent fixture in the Netherlands in two to five years, posing a risk...
description_zh: 虎蚊很可能在两到五年内成为荷兰的常驻物种，构成威胁……

title: Fire forces evacuation of Heemskerk apartment block; Locals warned neighbor needed help
title_zh: 火灾迫使希姆斯凯尔克公寓楼居民疏散；当地居民警告邻居需要帮助
description: Firefighters evacuated several floors of a Heemskerk apartment building due to a very large fire on the second floor during the early hours of Friday morning.
description_zh: 周五凌晨，海姆斯凯尔克一栋公寓楼二楼发生大火，消防员疏散了该楼数层居民。

title: Minister defends decision to deport Afghan women and girls
title_zh: 部长为驱逐阿富汗妇女和女孩的决定辩护
description: Caretaker asylum and migration minister David van Weel has defended the immigration service’s decision to reject asylum claims from several...
description_zh: 代理庇护和移民部长戴维·范·维尔为移民局拒绝多名人士的庇护申请的决定辩护……

title: Amsterdam erotic centre decision after local elections in March
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹情色中心的决定是在三月份地方选举之后做出的。
description: Amsterdam mayor Femke Halsema has halted work on the city’s proposed erotic centre near the Zuidas business district, pushing a...
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹市长费姆克·哈尔塞玛叫停了在祖伊达斯商业区附近拟建的情色中心项目，此举引发了争议……

title: Dutch MPs show more understanding for Nexperia intervention
title_zh: 荷兰议员对Nexperia的干预措施表现出更多理解。
description: MPs have signalled greater understanding about the way caretaker economic affairs minister Vincent Karremans intervened chip maker Nexperia during a...
description_zh: 议员们表示，他们对看守经济事务大臣文森特·卡雷曼斯在芯片制造商Nexperia事件期间的干预方式有了更深的理解……

title: Current policy wil increase traffic deaths; "Unpopular measures" needed for road safety
title_zh: 现行政策将导致交通事故死亡人数增加；为保障道路安全，需要采取“不受欢迎的措施”。
description: Under the current road safety policy, the number of people dying in traffic accidents on Dutch roads will increase by 10 percent by 2040.
description_zh: 根据目前的道路安全政策，到 2040 年，荷兰道路上因交通事故死亡的人数将增加 10%。

title: Cold and gray, but dry weather for Sinterklaas; Milder and wetter weather this weekend
title_zh: 圣尼古拉斯节当天天气寒冷阴沉，但干燥；本周末天气将转暖并有降雨。
description: Sinterklaas will face cold and gray weather for Pakjesavond this evening, but he and his Pieten will at least be dry, according to
description_zh: 今晚圣尼古拉斯节（Pakjesavond）当天，圣尼古拉斯将面临寒冷阴沉的天气，但据报道，他和他的圣婴至少不会着凉。

title: Cutting back on red tape: Dutch health insurance made simple
title_zh: 简化繁文缛节：荷兰医疗保险流程简单易懂
description: Baffled by the eigen risico? Clueless about what natura, combinatie and basispolis all mean? Here’s the lowdown. We are currently...
description_zh: 对特征风险感到困惑？对自然、组合和基础概念一头雾水？这里为您详细解释。我们目前……

title: Toys getting cheaper as other prices rise, likely due to China-U.S. tensions
title_zh: 玩具价格在其他商品价格上涨的同时却在下降，这很可能是由于中美关系紧张所致。
description: Toys have become cheaper in the Netherlands over the past year. This is striking, as products have generally become increasingly expensive.
description_zh: 过去一年，荷兰的玩具价格有所下降。这令人惊讶，因为总体而言，商品价格都在上涨。

title: Head Piet received death threats over story line in Sinterklaas show
title_zh: 皮特校长因圣尼古拉斯剧的剧情而收到死亡威胁
description: Niels van der Laan, the Head Piet in the Sinterklaasjournaal, has received multiple death threats this week, Merel Westrik, the presenter of the kids’ show, revealed on the talk show Eva.
description_zh: 儿童节目《圣尼古拉斯杂志》的主持人梅雷尔·韦斯特里克在脱口秀节目《伊娃》中透露，该节目的首席彼得尼尔斯·范德兰本周收到了多起死亡威胁。

title: Moerdijk residents considering going to court over village's disappearance
title_zh: 莫尔代克居民考虑就村庄消失一事提起诉讼
description: Residents of Moerdijk village in Noord-Brabant are considering legal action after government plans to
description_zh: 北布拉班特省莫尔代克村的居民正在考虑采取法律行动，此前政府计划……

title: Advisory body very critical of plan for nearly free childcare for working parents
title_zh: 咨询机构对为在职父母提供近乎免费的托儿服务的计划持强烈批评态度。
description: The Advisory Body for Regulatory Burden Assessment has urged the Government not to go through with its plan to make childcare almost free for working parents.
description_zh: 监管负担评估咨询机构敦促政府不要实施让在职父母几乎免费享受托儿服务的计划。

title: Amsterdam mayor urges Justice Ministry to investigate fireworks chaos at Ajax match
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹市长敦促司法部调查阿贾克斯比赛烟花燃放引发的混乱事件。
description: Amsterdam Mayor Femke Halsema has requested the Ministry of Justice and Security to investigate the fireworks incident during the match between Ajax and FC Groningen.
description_zh: 阿姆斯特丹市长费姆克·哈尔塞玛已要求司法和安全部调查阿贾克斯与格罗宁根足球俱乐部比赛期间发生的烟花事件。

title: Tata Steel deal a "subsidy trap" that could cost government millions: study
title_zh: 研究显示，塔塔钢铁交易可能是一个“补贴陷阱”，会让政府损失数百万美元。
description: Tata Steel could potentially receive hundreds of millions of euros in additional government support each year until 2040, according to researchers from the Stichting Onderzoek Multinationale Ondern
description_zh: 根据Stichting Onderzoek Multinationale Ondern的研究人员的说法，塔塔钢铁公司到2040年每年可能获得数亿欧元的额外政府支持。

title: Netherlands pulls out of Eurovision as organizer votes to keep Israel in 2026 contest
title_zh: 荷兰退出欧洲歌唱大赛，而主办方投票决定保留以色列参加2026年比赛。
description: The Netherlands will not take part in next year's Eurovision Song Contest, with Dutch broadcast rights holder AvroTros deciding to boycott the event.
description_zh: 荷兰将不会参加明年的欧洲歌唱大赛，荷兰广播权持有者AvroTros决定抵制该赛事。

title: Amsterdam performer Fer Rodil's darkly funny take on his harsh year facing cancer & loss
title_zh: 阿姆斯特丹表演艺术家费尔·罗迪尔以黑色幽默的方式讲述了他与癌症和失去亲人抗争的艰难一年。
description: What happens when a professional storyteller is handed a narrative too painful to tell?
description_zh: 当一位专业的故事讲述者遇到一个过于痛苦而无法讲述的故事时，会发生什么？

title: Site that let Dutch bet on parliamentary elections also taking bets on world conflicts
title_zh: 该网站允许荷兰人对议会选举进行投注，也接受对世界冲突的投注。
description: Polymarket, the illegal gambling website that let thousands of Dutch gamble on the outcome of the parliamentary elections, is also taking bets on world conflicts,
description_zh: Polymarket是一个非法赌博网站，曾让成千上万的荷兰人就议会选举结果进行赌博，如今它也开始接受关于世界冲突的赌注。

title: Dutch pull out of Eurovision Song Festival due to Israel
title_zh: 因以色列问题，荷兰退出欧洲歌唱大赛
description: The Netherlands will not take part in next year’s Eurovision Song Contest following the decision by organiser EBU not to...
description_zh: 荷兰将不会参加明年的欧洲歌唱大赛，因为主办方欧洲广播联盟（EBU）决定不让荷兰参赛……

title: One in three Dutch think Cabinet formation process will be faster than last time
title_zh: 三分之一的荷兰人认为，内阁组建过程将比上次更快。
description: A third of the Dutch population expects the current Cabinet formation to move faster than previous ones, a survey by Kieskompas and ANP among over 56,000 people shows.
description_zh: Kieskompas 和 ANP 对超过 56,000 人进行的调查显示，三分之一的荷兰民众希望本次内阁组建速度比以往更快。

title: Dutch cabinet talks reach impasse with “no coalition possible”
title_zh: 荷兰内阁谈判陷入僵局，“不可能组建联合政府”
description: Coalition negotiator Sybrand Buma said on Thursday afternoon he plans to force a decision on potential cabinet partners on Friday,...
description_zh: 联合政府谈判代表西布兰德·布马周四下午表示，他计划在周五迫使各方就潜在的内阁伙伴做出决定……

title: Coalition mediator sees no clear path to majority or minority Cabinet as talks drag on
title_zh: 联盟调解员认为，由于谈判陷入僵局，组建多数派或少数派内阁的路径尚不明朗。
description: Informateur Sybrand Buma, the mediator appointed to explore possible governing coalitions, said he sees “no viable majority coalition” emerging, nor a minority coalition with sufficient backing to
description_zh: 受命探讨可能组建执政联盟的调解人西布兰德·布马表示，他认为“既没有可行的多数派联盟”出现，也没有获得足够支持的少数派联盟。

title: More Dutch internet users doubt the accuracy of online information
title_zh: 越来越多的荷兰网民对网络信息的准确性表示怀疑
description: More people in the Netherlands are distrustful of information they find on the internet, according to Statistics Netherlands.
description_zh: 荷兰统计局的数据显示，荷兰越来越多的人对他们在互联网上找到的信息持怀疑态度。

title: Five injured in Rotterdam garage explosion; One in critical condition
title_zh: 鹿特丹车库爆炸致五人受伤，一人伤势危重
description: Five people were injured on Thursday afternoon in Rotterdam after an explosion occurred in a garage.
description_zh: 周四下午，鹿特丹一处车库发生爆炸，造成五人受伤。

title: Ban on use of embryos created for science set to be lifted
title_zh: 对用于科学研究的胚胎的使用禁令即将解除
description: A majority of MPs is likely to support a draft proposal to lift the ban on the use of embryos...
description_zh: 大多数议员可能会支持一项解除胚胎使用禁令的提案草案……

title: Court orders involuntary psychiatric care for Father who killed Son, 12; no jail time
title_zh: 法院下令强制对杀害12岁儿子的父亲进行精神病治疗；不判刑。
description: A 46-year-old man from Groningen has been sentenced to mandatory psychiatric treatment for the murder of his 12-year-old. The court convicted Curt E.
description_zh: 一名来自格罗宁根的46岁男子因谋杀其12岁儿子而被判处强制精神病治疗。法院认定库尔特·E·

title: Police warn Verstappen fans to watch out for fake tickets as decisive F1 race approaches
title_zh: 随着F1关键比赛临近，警方警告维斯塔潘的粉丝们要警惕假票。
description: The police have issued a warning on social media regarding fake tickets for the final race of the F1 season this Sunday in Abu Dhabi, where Max Verstappen and two other drivers are still able to wi
description_zh: 警方在社交媒体上发出警告，提醒公众注意本周日在阿布扎比举行的F1赛季收官战的假票，马克斯·维斯塔潘和其他两位车手仍有机会赢得比赛。

title: Eat more pulses and less red meat, Dutch health council says
title_zh: 荷兰卫生委员会建议多吃豆类，少吃红肉。
description: The Dutch health council Gezondheidsraad has published new guidelines for eating protein which include less meat and more pulses than...
description_zh: 荷兰卫生委员会Gezondheidsraad发布了新的蛋白质摄入指南，其中包括减少肉类摄入，增加豆类摄入……

title: Health Council updates guidelines: eat less meat, more legumes and nuts
title_zh: 卫生委员会更新指南：少吃肉，多吃豆类和坚果
description: For those seeking a diet that supports personal health and environmental sustainability, the Health Council’s new guidelines emphasize decreasing meat intake while increasing consumption of legumes
description_zh: 对于那些追求既有益于个人健康又能兼顾环境可持续性的饮食的人来说，健康委员会的新指南强调减少肉类摄入，同时增加豆类的摄入量。

title: Three killed, one injured in The Hague in police car chase crash
title_zh: 海牙发生警车追逐事故，造成三人死亡，一人受伤。
description: Three people have been killed and one injured in a police car chase in The Hague in the early hours...
description_zh: 凌晨时分，海牙发生一起警车追逐事件，造成三人死亡，一人受伤……

title: Netherlands speculates on likely Eurovision entrant as participation remains uncertain
title_zh: 荷兰方面猜测可能参加欧洲歌唱大赛的选手，但参赛资格仍不明朗。
description: Davina Michelle, 30, has emerged as a leading candidate to represent the Netherlands at the 2026 Eurovision Song Contest in Vienna, but the country’s participation remains uncertain because Dutch b
description_zh: 30岁的达维娜·米歇尔已成为代表荷兰参加2026年维也纳欧洲歌唱大赛的热门人选，但由于荷兰……，该国能否参赛仍存在不确定性。

title: Dordrecht cemetery opened 30 coffins for experiments without consent
title_zh: 多德雷赫特公墓未经同意打开了30口棺材用于实验。
description: A cemetery in Dordrecht opened 30 coffins in burial vaults multiple times without the surviving relatives’ knowledge or consent.
description_zh: 多德雷赫特的一处墓地在未告知或征得死者亲属同意的情况下，多次打开墓穴中的 30 个棺材。

title: Elections, Charlie Kirk murder dominate Dutch Google searches in 2025
title_zh: 2025年，选举和查理·柯克谋杀案将成为荷兰谷歌搜索的热门话题
description: In 2025, the Dutch most searched for StemWijzer, the online voting advice tool, followed by the murder of American activist Charlie Kirk, with general searches for the October 29 Tweede Kamer elect
description_zh: 2025年，荷兰人搜索最多的关键词是StemWijzer（一款在线投票建议工具），其次是美国活动家查理·柯克遇害案，以及与10月29日荷兰下议院选举相关的搜索。

title: Singer Marco Borsato not guilty of sexually abusing girl, 15
title_zh: 歌手马可·博尔萨托被判无罪，此前他被控性侵一名15岁女孩。
description: Dutch popular singer Marco Borsato has been found not guilty of sexually abusing an underage girl, with judges in Utrecht...
description_zh: 荷兰流行歌手马尔科·博尔萨托被判无罪，此前他被指控性侵一名未成年少女。乌得勒支的法官们……

title: Nearly 201,000 vacant homes in the Netherlands, 11% in Amsterdam alone
title_zh: 荷兰近20.1万套房屋空置，仅阿姆斯特丹一地就占11%。
description: The Netherlands passed the threshold of 200,000 empty homes this summer, even as the country continues to face acute housing shortages, CBS reported.
description_zh: 据哥伦比亚广播公司报道，今年夏天，荷兰空置房屋数量突破了 20 万套，而该国仍然面临严重的住房短缺问题。

title: Court acquits singer Marco Borsato of child sex abuse with 15-year-old girl
title_zh: 法庭宣判歌手马可·博尔萨托性侵15岁女孩罪名不成立
description: The court in Utrecht acquitted Marco Borsato of sexually assaulting a 15-year-old girl, the daughter of the woman who chaired his fan club.
description_zh: 乌得勒支法院宣判马尔科·博尔萨托性侵15岁少女罪名不成立，该少女是其粉丝俱乐部主席的女儿。
